## Plugin Information

- **Plugin/addon name:**
- **Upstream URL:**
- **License:** (e.g. MIT, Apache-2.0)

- **Godot version compatibility:**

## Selection Axis Assessment

| Axis | Rating (1–5) | Reasoning |
|------|:---:|-----------|
| Automation value | | How much CI/test value does this plugin provide? |
| Reuse breadth | | How many project types benefit? |
| Domain coupling | | How tightly coupled to a specific genre? |
| Maintenance cost | | How stable is the upstream? How often do breaking changes occur? |

## Suggested Pack Category

- [ ] Baseline (always included)
- [ ] Optional vendor pack (opt-in)
- [ ] Architecture pack (toolbox-owned)
